items.title: Why Google's AI can't spell Google (or anything else)
Amazon to Acquire Apple's Globalstar Stake in Satellite Deal
items.summary: Amazon is acquiring Apple satellite provider Globalstar, and it has worked out a deal to take over Apple's stake in the satellite company. According to an FCC filing noticed by PCMag , Amazon is initiating a merger structure. It will...

items.title: FCC filing shows Amazon plans to acquire Apple's 20% stake in Globalstar
items.summary: Following last month's announcement that Amazon would acquire Globalstar, the company has now informed the FCC that it will also take over Apple's 20% stake in the satellite connectivity company. Here are the details.

items.title: Robotaxi has the wrong kind of momentum, but wind, and solar are doing GREAT
items.summary: On today's momentous episode of Quick Charge , we are all about momentum, with solid-state EV batteries gaining ground in China as wind and solar continuing to grow in the US while Tesla's self-driving Robotaxi fleet, well - doesn't .

items.title: WhatsApp will soon make it easy for iPhone users share documents with Meta AI
items.summary: Meta AI could soon analyze PDFs, notes and spreadsheets right in the WhatsApp on iPhones. That should be convenient! (via Cult of Mac - Your source for the latest Apple news, rumors, analysis, reviews, how-tos and deals. )

items.title: Hyundai is testing a new high-tech SDV setup in the IONIQ 6 EV [Images]
items.summary: A disguised IONIQ 6 was spotted near Hyundai's R&D hub in Europe, revealing much more than a standard refresh model.

items.title: Roku Unveils Redesigned Home Screen
items.summary: Roku today announced that its home screen is receiving its biggest redesign in more than a decade. The new home screen will begin rolling out to Roku TVs and streaming devices across the U.S. starting today, with more countries to follow...

items.title: AI costs begin to bite as agents may increase token demand by 24 times, says Goldman Sachs report - Uber and Microsoft among companies feeling the bite of tokenized billing
items.summary: Major tech companies are considering refining their approaches to AI, as rising token costs and increased token demand from AI agents make the costs harder to justify, with limited return on the investment.

items.title: Should I Use the Manufacturer iBeacon SDKs?
items.summary: Some manufacturers offer SDKs to allow programmatic access to their beacons from iOS and Android. Most SDKs tend to be poorly implemented/documented, tie your code into using that particular beacon and rarely get updated to use newer...
